#nullable enable

namespace TestNs
{
    partial class MyControl
    {
        /// <summary>
        /// Defines the <see cref="SelectedIndex"/> property.
        /// </summary>
        public static readonly global::Avalonia.DirectProperty<global::TestNs.MyControl, int> SelectedIndexProperty =
            global::Avalonia.AvaloniaProperty.RegisterDirect<global::TestNs.MyControl, int>(nameof(SelectedIndex), static o => o.SelectedIndex);

        public partial int SelectedIndex
        {
            get => field;
            private set => SetAndRaise(SelectedIndexProperty, ref field, value);
        }
    }
}
